model_specification_line: result = smf.wls('full_time ~ eligible_post + eligible + post + age_f + age_sq + male + UNEMP + C(statefip) + C(year)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
sample_selection: citizen == 3 (not a citizen — proxy for undocumented status)
yrimmig <= 2007 (arrived before continuous-residence threshold of June 15 2007)
